title: Adult Influenza Vaccination
text: Annual influenza vaccination is recommended for all persons aged 6 months or older who do not have contraindications. For adults 65 years or older, ACIP preferentially recommends the use of a higher-dose or adjuvanted influenza vaccine when available. Persons with egg allergy of any severity may receive any age-appropriate influenza vaccine.

title: Tdap and Td Booster in Adults
text: Adults who have not previously received Tdap should receive 1 dose of Tdap, followed by Td or Tdap every 10 years. Pregnant persons should receive 1 dose of Tdap during each pregnancy, preferably during the early part of gestational weeks 27 through 36, regardless of prior vaccination history.
